metadata.label: gen2/Genentech-MLInfra
metadata.title: Machine Learning Engineer/Senior Machine Learning Engineer - Infra
metadata.team_direction: Genentech is a leading biotechnology company focused on innovation and healthcare access

findings.field: Experience bullets across TikTok and DiDi
findings.issue: Several bullets bold qualifying adjectives or ownership markers such as "team-maintained", "intern-owned", and "team-owned". That weakens the visual convention that bold should be reserved for technologies and the most important scale/result signals.
findings.fix: Remove bold from modifiers and keep bolding focused on core technologies, key metrics, and scope signals.

findings.field: Professional Summary; TikTok and DiDi sections
findings.issue: The resume tells a strong infra story, but it does not explicitly connect that experience to Genentech's biotech / healthcare context. A reviewer may still have to infer the migration logic from security, marketplace, and food-delivery work.
findings.fix: Add one concise bridge sentence in Summary or the most relevant project framing how auditability, privacy-sensitive workflows, and evaluation / replay patterns transfer to regulated healthcare ML infra.

findings.issue: The summary and newest role surface six programming languages as if they were all primary daily-stack languages. That reads like stack inflation unless you distinguish core ownership from adjacency or integration work.
findings.fix: Reduce each role to 2-3 primary languages and move the rest into supporting notes or project-specific integration details.

findings.issue: The newest section leans heavily on latency and percentage improvements, but it does not give a Tier 1 scope anchor such as service scale, team size, request volume, or SLA. That weakens the seniority signal on first pass.
findings.fix: Rewrite the strongest TikTok bullet to include one concrete scope metric or ownership boundary alongside the improvement result.

revision_priority: [SHOULD] Add one explicit bridge sentence for Genentech that ties the security / evaluation / replay work to regulated healthcare ML infra.
[SHOULD] Trim the apparent multi-language surface area by marking which languages were primary versus support / integration languages in each role.
[SHOULD] Add one Tier 1 scope signal to the TikTok section so the newest experience reads senior enough on first scan.
[NICE] Remove bold from modifiers and keep the bolding pattern reserved for technologies and high-value metrics.
